query: 各商品类目的销售额和订单数
sql: SELECT dp.category_name, SUM(dod.pay_amount) AS actual_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT dod.order_id) AS order_count FROM dwd_order_detail dod JOIN dim_product dp ON dod.product_id = dp.product_id WHERE dod.order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 30) GROUP BY dp.category_name ORDER BY actual_amount DESC
explanation: 通过订单明细关联商品维度表，按类目名称汇总销售额和订单数
